---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Fit with project principles

How does this keep answers evidence-grounded, preserve the offline path, and
avoid vendor lock-in? (See OVERVIEW.md.)

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, references, related issues.
